summary: Tested extended payout settings with IBAN, BIC/SWIFT for international transfers via Wise. Backend API tests pass 100%. Frontend code review confirms all required fields are implemented correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Unable to login via Playwright automation - login button click doesn't navigate to dashboard. This is a pre-existing issue not related to the new payout settings feature.

critical_code_review_comments: All new fields correctly implemented in PayoutSettings model (enterprise_portal.py lines 1067-1076)
BIC/SWIFT validation correctly implemented in wise_payouts.py (lines 84-89) - validates 8 or 11 characters
Frontend form correctly includes all new fields: bic_swift, bank_name, bank_country, currency (AdminEnterpriseManagement.js lines 441-550)
Country dropdown includes all required countries: DE, AT, CH, NL, BE, FR, IT, ES, PL, GB, US, TR, AE
Currency dropdown includes all required currencies: EUR, USD, GBP, CHF, TRY, AED
Hint text 'Für internationale Überweisungen' is present for BIC/SWIFT field

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - UI automation blocked by login issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Extended payout settings feature is fully implemented. Backend API tests confirm all new fields (bic_swift, bank_name, bank_country, currency) are accepted and persisted correctly. Frontend code review confirms form UI has all required fields with correct dropdowns. Admin login via Playwright automation is not working (pre-existing issue), but this doesn't affect the feature implementation.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/enterprise/admin/list - Returns payout_settings with new fields
PUT /api/enterprise/admin/payout-settings/{id} - Accepts and stores bic_swift, bank_name, bank_country, currency

fields_verified: Bank Name input field with placeholder 'Commerzbank, Sparkasse, etc.'
Country dropdown with 13 countries (DE, AT, CH, NL, BE, FR, IT, ES, PL, GB, US, TR, AE)
Currency dropdown with 6 currencies (EUR, USD, GBP, CHF, TRY, AED)

wise_payouts_validation.bic_validation: Validates 8 or 11 characters with error message 'BIC/SWIFT muss 8 oder 11 Zeichen haben'
